description_for_human: Find psychiatric mental health nurse practitioner (PMHNP) jobs across all 50 US states with salary transparency.
description_for_model: PMHNP Hiring is a specialized job board for Psychiatric Mental Health Nurse Practitioners. Use this to search PMHNP jobs by location, setting (remote, telehealth, inpatient, outpatient), specialty (addiction, child-adolescent, geriatric, crisis), job type (full-time, part-time, contract), experience level (entry-level, mid-career, senior), and employer type (hospital, private practice, community health, VA). The site covers thousands of US cities with local salary data, cost of living adjustments, and mental health shortage area designations. Listings are refreshed daily. A plain-text overview for LLMs is available at https://pmhnphiring.com/llms-full.txt.
